name: Mini Hobby Horse Toby
description: Ride away with me! Our Mini Hobby Horses feature our most-loved characters on a Toy Pony-sized head and a slightly shorter detachable stick, making them light, agile and easy to manoeuvre. Competitive hobby horsing enthusiasts - and small children who need a lighter ride will both appreciate this feature. Mini Hobby Horse Toby has an adorable imaginary personality! A born eventer, he loves cross country. He's big, bouncy, loving and lovable. Very playful in the field when turned out with his friends, he loves to show off his beautiful tobiano markings. Toy Pony accessories will fit (head only, e.g Toy Pony Bridles, Headcollars, Fly Hoods) (Hobby Horse pole 44cm/ Mini Hobby Horse pole 39cm). Suitable for ages 3+

name: Mini Hobby Horse Sundance
description: Ride away with me! Our Mini Hobby Horses feature our most-loved characters on a Toy Pony-sized head and a slightly shorter detachable stick, making them light, agile and easy to manoeuvre. Competitive hobby horsing enthusiasts - and small children who need a lighter ride will both appreciate this feature. Mini Hobby Horse Sundance has a sweet imaginary story! A beautiful fine cob, Sundance is calm and gentle, but really agile and quick when you want to go faster! Together, you'll love a gallop along the beach. Toy Pony accessories will fit (head only, e.g Toy Pony Bridles, Headcollars, Fly Hoods) (Hobby Horse pole 44cm/ Mini Hobby Horse pole 39cm). Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Poppy
description: Get geared up for horse riding with Poppy, our pretty strawberry (pink) roan Hobby Horse. Complete with a realistic head, plaitable mane and a hook and loop mouth to hold our matching accessories; this beautifully hand-finished classic toy has a detachable wooden stick that's just the right length for all Hobby Horse adventures. Mixy matching accessories are also available to give Hobby Horse Poppy the look of your dreams. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Dazzle
description: Get geared up for horse riding with Dazzle, our gorgeous brown and white skewbald Hobby Horse. Complete with a wall eye, plaitable mane and a hook and loop mouth to hold our matching accessories; this beautifully hand-finished classic toy has a detachable wooden stick that's just the right length for all Hobby Horse adventures. Mixy matching accessories are also available to give Hobby Horse Dazzle the look of your dreams. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Earl
description: Let's go! Get geared up for horse riding with Earl, our bold and powerful grey Hobby Horse. His captivating imaginary story is sure to inspire your next adventure. Earl (aka Earl Grey) is the ultimate hacking horse. A real gentleman, he takes all terrain in his stride. Earl could gallop over rolling hills and explore ancient forests for hours on end. He's a noble trusty steed who dreams of being a prince or princess' horse of choice as they ride into adventure. Complete with a realistic head, plaitable mane and a hook and loop mouth to hold our matching accessories; this beautifully hand-finished classic toy has a detachable wooden stick that's just the right length for all Hobby Horse adventures. Mixy matching accessories are also available to give Hobby Horse Earl the look of your dreams. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Dakota
description: Howdy, partner! Get ready to ride the trails with Dakota, our black-spotted Appaloosa Hobby Horse! Get your little equestrian geared up for endless active playtime with Dakota. Children of all ages will fall in love with Dakota's Appaloosa-spotted coat and dual-coloured mane. Complete with a realistic head, plaitable mane and a hook and loop mouth to hold our range of Hobby Horse accessories, mini riders will enjoy hours of fun galloping around with their very own Hobby Horse. A detachable wooden stick is just the right length for all kinds of Hobby Horsing adventures. Matching Western accessories are also available to style Dakota's look to fit all mini riders' equestrian wildest dreams. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Hunter Bridle Brown
description: Little equestrians can learn all about the Hunter style with this realistic, full adjustable Hunter bridle. Made from soft leather, it has a metal bit that fits perfectly into your Hobby Horse's mouth. Just like the real thing, this Hunter bridle has smart stitching details and laced reins ready for the show ring. Suitable for ages 8+

name: Hobby Horse Double Bridle Black
description: A real leather double bridle crafted by artisans just like the real thing. This Hobby Horse double bridle has functional buckles for perfect fitting and adjustment in miniature. A snazzy crystal padded browband gives the LeMieux look, while a soft white leather and black patent leather padded noseband lends an authentic dressage appearance. Complete with mini Weymouth and Bradoon bits, with two sets of reins, it's perfect for little dressage riders to practice tacking up.

name: Hobby Horse Dream
description: Get ready to gallop with Dream, our striking dun Hobby Horse! Get your little equestrian geared up for endless active playtime with Dream. Children of all ages will fall in love with Dream's beautiful dun-coloured coat and smart black mane. Complete with a realistic head, plaitable mane and a hook and loop mouth to hold our range of Hobby Horse accessories, mini riders will enjoy hours of fun galloping around with their very own Hobby Horse. A detachable wooden stick is just the right length for all kinds of Hobby Horsing adventures. Matching accessories are also available to style Dream's look to fit all mini riders' equestrian wildest dreams. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Razzle
description: It's showtime for Hobby Horse riders with Razzle, our champion black-and-white piebald Hobby Horse! Get your little equestrian geared up for endless active playtime with Razzle our showing cob, featuring a smart black-and white-mane. His imaginary story and personality will make him a favourite in your Hobby Horse collection. He's a spirited boy who loves showing off, equally at home galloping on the beach and prancing around the show ring! Complete with a realistic head, plaitable mane and a hook and loop mouth to hold our range of Hobby Horse accessories, mini riders will enjoy hours of fun galloping around with their very own Hobby Horse. A strong wooden stick is just the right length for all kinds of Hobby Horsing adventures. Matching accessories are also available to replicate the real Razzle's showing championship look. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Vogue Headcollar & Leadrope Blossom
description: Our Hobby Horse Vogue Headcollar is a soft and stylish headcollar for your hobby horse adventures. It features luxurious fleece inserts at the poll strap and nose band. It's multi-adjustable at the curb and poll strap from both sides. A colourful and durable matching leadrope is included. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Stable Rug Navy
description: Keep your Hobby Horse warm and cosy in their stable at night with this stable rug. Featuring a front T-bar metal closure and a detachable neck, it's just like the real thing with authentic details and materials, helping little equestrians learn about pony care through play. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Spike
description: Giddy-up with Spike, our handsome black Hobby Horse! His imaginary story is based on a LeMieux team member's real dressage horse - he's a calm and classy boy who is as proud as he is handsome! Get your little equestrian geared up for endless active playtime with Spike. Children of all ages will fall in love with Spike's rich black-coloured coat and smart black mane. Complete with a realistic head, plaitable mane and a hook and loop mouth to hold our range of Hobby Horse accessories, mini riders will enjoy hours of fun galloping around with their very own Hobby Horse. A detachable wooden stick is just the right length for all kinds of Hobby Horsing adventures. Matching accessories are also available to style Spike's look to fit all mini riders' equestrian wildest dreams. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Jump Purple
description: Designed exclusively for hobby horse sport training, this realistic show jump is intended for controlled practice and display, not for play. This LeMieux replica show jump features fixed jump cups set at 10 cm intervals, allowing jump heights from 30 cm to 80 cm. Lightweight plastic poles are designed to dislodge safely when contacted. Manufactured in the UK. The set comprises one complete jump, including two jump wings and two jump poles. The jump base includes a pre-greased fitting section for insertion into the uprights. Handle with care during assembly. WARNING: • For hobby horse sport training use only • Not intended for play • Not suitable for persons under 14 years of age • This product is not a toy

name: Hobby Horse Showing Bridle Black
description: Little equestrians can learn all about showing style with this realistic, full adjustable Showing bridle. Made from soft leather, it has a metal bit that fits perfectly into your Hobby Horse's mouth. Just like the real thing, this showing bridle has a beautiful, eye-catching browband and buckled reins ready for the show ring. Suitable for ages 8+

name: Hobby Horse Lemon
description: Lemon is LeMieux's pony mascot, rehomed by the Lemieux family from charity partners World Horse Welfare. As Head of Pony Relations, she's helped LeMieux raise nearly £100,000 for this great cause since 2022. Every Lemon (or Toy Daphne the Donkey) sold raises £2.50 for World Horse Welfare. Her coat is super soft – perfect for brushing and looking after. She has a fluffy mane and a detachable wooden stick making her ideal for hours of active play and running around. Of course, additional matching accessories are available for Lemon in her favourite colours, including a Vogue headcollar and leadrope, making her not only great fun to play with, but educational too! Each Lemon is individually hand-made, varying slightly in size and shape. Does not include accessories, these are sold separately. Suitable for ages 3 years+

name: Hobby Horse Flash
description: Let's go! Get your little one geared up for horse riding with Flash, our striking skewbald Hobby Horse. His captivating imaginary story is sure to steal your heart. Flash is a true gentleman, turning his hand to long rides and challenging jumps, always taking good care of his rider. Complete with a realistic head, plaitable mane and a hook and loop mouth to hold our matching accessories, mini riders will enjoy hours of active, educational playtime with their very own Hobby Horse. This beautifully hand-finished classic toy has a detachable wooden stick that's just the right length for all Hobby Horse adventures. Matching accessories are also available to give Hobby Horse Flash the mixy matchy look. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Fly Mask Navy
description: Our Hobby Horse Fly Mask is an identical miniature version of the classic ArmourShield for regular-sized horses. Perfect for keeping bugs away when playing outdoors on warm spring days, this fly mask has breathable mesh ears, a soft fleece trim and a protective visor mesh. It's the perfect accessory for teaching young riders how to care for their horse – and it means your LeMieux Hobby Horse can look just like the real thing! Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Christmas Headcollar & Leadrope Red
description: What better way to celebrate the festive season than by dressing your Hobby Horse in Santa colours! This soft headcollar in red nylon webbing and white faux-fur fleece is the perfect Christmassy accessory. Little equestrians can learn and play at catching, leading, and tying up their Hobby horse, and practising those tricky quick-release knots will be easy with the soft and flexible lead rope. This headcollar is fully adjustable and removable, just like the real thing, with a fastening on the headpiece and a clip-on two-tone leadrope.

name: Hobby Horse Freya
description: Freya is a beautiful bay eventer with a plaitable dark brown mane. Her coat is incredibly soft, perfect for brushing and looking after. Her imaginary story and personality will make her a favourite in your Hobby Horse collection. Freya is a very kind horse with a big heart. She loves jumping and can be sassy in the stable! She’s a foodie – she loves her hay and treats. She’s very pretty and loves being well groomed for shows and photo shoots. Hobby Horse Freya is fixed to a sturdy wooden stick for active play, and is individually hand-finished, making each one unique. Of course, additional matching accessories are available for Hobby Horse Freya in your favourite colours, including headcollars, fly hoods and fully working bridles in real leather. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Sammy
description: Pick up a pony with Hobby Horse Sammie, a gorgeous dappled grey with pretty grey mane. His coat is super soft – perfect for grooming and looking after. A detachable wooden stick makes this delightful toy safe for all kinds of Hobby Horsing adventures. Their hook and loop mouth holds your Hobby Horse accessories. Every Hobby Horse is individually hand finished, varying slightly in size and shape. Of course, additional matching accessories are available for Sam in your favourite colours, including fly hoods, headcollars, and fully working bridles in real leather, making these toys great fun to play with and educational, too. Accessories sold separately. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Fly Hood Blossom
description: Our Hobby Horse Fly Hood is an identical miniature version of the Classic Fly Hood. Crafted from intricate handmade crochet in sweet and smart colours, it looks just like the real thing. We've even added soft suede ears and a braided trim, giving your Hobby Horse a sophisticated mixy matchy look! Suitable for ages 3+

name: Disney Hobby Horse Accessories Set Pegasus
description: Disney Hobby Horse Pegasus's accessories are inspired by his best friend Hercules. This authentic set of accessories will prepare Hobby Horse Pegasus to take flight on his mythical wings. A sturdy and stylish headcollar, fly hood and rosette are the perfect accessories to give Pegasus his look from the Disney film Hercules. Suitable for ages 0+

name: Disney Hobby Horse Accessories Set Maximus
description: Disney Hobby Horse Maximus's accessories are inspired by his greatest ambition, to help Rapunzel as captain of the guard! This authentic set of accessories will prepare Hobby Horse Maximus to defend the kingdom with all his mighty strength. A sturdy and stylish headcollar, fly hood and rosette are the perfect accessories to give Maximus his look from the Disney film Tangled. Suitable for ages 0+

name: Hobby Horse Running Martingale Black
description: A fine addition to your Hobby Horse tack collection, this soft leather martingale is made just like the real thing. Designed to work with a Hobby Horse Bridle, it's perfect for young equestrians to learn more about equipment for the horse. The adjustable neckpiece fits your Hobby Horse comfortably, with metal rings to thread the reins through, and a buckle to fasten to the top of the stick. Hours of educational fun await! Suitable for ages 8+

name: Hobby Horse Fly Hood Black
description: Our Hobby Horse Fly Hood is an identical miniature version of the Classic Fly Hood. Crafted from intricate handmade crochet in sweet and smart colours, it looks just like the real thing. We've even added soft suede ears and a braided trim, giving your Hobby Horse a sophisticated mixy matchy look! Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Racing Bridle Set Black
description: Our Hobby Horse Racing Bridle Set features an authentic racing orange rein, racing snaffle, removable shadow roll and French blinker that replicates the real thing. The matching ribbon browband comes in their racing colours for a full matching look. Get ready to race! Suitable for ages 8+

name: Hobby Horse Running Martingale Brown
description: A fine addition to your Hobby Horse tack collection, this soft leather martingale is made just like the real thing. Designed to work with a Hobby Horse Bridle, it's perfect for young equestrians to learn more about equipment for the horse. The adjustable neckpiece fits your Hobby Horse comfortably, with metal rings to thread the reins through, and a buckle to fasten to the top of the stick. Hours of educational fun await! Suitable for ages 8+

name: Hobby Horse Western Bridle Tan
description: Encourage mini wranglers to learn about Western horse care with the Hobby Horse Western Bridle from LeMieux. This Western-style leather bridle features a decorative browband, split rein and shank bit that looks just like the real thing – only made miniature for cowboy adventures. Suitable for ages 8+

name: Hobby Horse Stay Calm Mask Black
description: Keep your Hobby Horse calm when riding - ideal if they've been feeling a little spooky or frisky lately! Perfect for teaching horse care through imaginative, active play, this authentic accessory helps young equestrians develop and deepen their applied knowledge of tack options. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Disney Hobby Horse Pegasus
description: Disney Hobby Horse Pegasus is ready to take flight on his mythical wings with his best friend Hercules - and now with you. With a bright blue mane, open mouth, and white 3D plush wings, Pegasus is the dream horse of ancient Greek mythology! His white coat is incredibly soft, perfect for airborne adventures and earthly cuddles. Pegasus matches with his unique matching set of accessories, including a headcollar, fly hood, and rosette - sold separately. With a sturdy, detachable wooden stick that's just the right length for all Hobby Horse adventures, these delightful Disney toys are individually hand-finished. Suitable for ages 0+

name: Badminton Hobby Horse Franklin
description: Introducing our very special LeMieux Badminton Hobby Horse, named 'Franklin' after Franklin Clarence Mars, the founder of the iconic Mars brand in the 1920s, the brand now the title sponsor of the 5* Mars Badminton Horse Trials 2025. This adorable, active toy will become a prized possession for equestrian enthusiasts and pony-mad children alike. The pony has a white blaze, a plaitable mane and an open mouth for wearing LeMieux Hobby Horse accessories, like the Badminton Hobby Horse Vogue Headcollar and matching Leadrope. The pony was named by the winner of a competition among Badminton fans, engaging and involving the event’s passionate community.

name: Hobby Horse Clean Hood Navy
description: Keep your Hobby Horse clean and neat before show day with this professional-looking Keep Clean Hood! Easy to pop on, and neatly secured with ear holes and an elasticated hole at the stick end. Eye holes allow a full range of vision for curious Hobby Horses! Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Stretch Hood Chilli
description: Dress your hobby horse in our bold chilli red stretch Race Hood. Made from stretchy elastane for a perfect fit over the eyes and ears, it replicates the feel of a real race day during interactive play. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Fly Hood Chilli
description: An identical miniature version of the Classic Fly Hood with intricate handmade crochet, our Toy Pony Fly Hood is the perfect addition to your Toy Pony setup. Super soft suede ears, beautiful braiding detail and LeMieux logo means your Mini LeMieux Pony can look just like the real thing in a full matchy matchy outfit! Suitable for ages 3+

name: Hobby Horse Winners Rug Red
description: Celebrate a win in your playtime championship with this premium winner's rug, styled to fit your Hobby Horse. With a realistic T-bar front closure and printed hook and loop presentation panel, it's just like the real thing, perfect for little equestrians who want to learn more about pony care through play. Suitable for ages 3+

name: Disney Hobby Horse Bullseye
description: Disney Hobby Horse Bullseye is complete in every detail. Instantly recognisable as one of Woody's original Roundup gang, he has a cute stand-up mane, soft pink suede-feel muzzle, and an excitable expression. His tan-coloured coat is incredibly soft, perfect for Western playtimes and ideal for cuddles. Bullseye matches with his own unique set of accessories, sold separately, including a headcollar, reversible neckerchief with 3D bow, and rosette. With a sturdy, detachable wooden stick that's just the right length for all Hobby Horse adventures, these delightful Disney toys are individually hand-finished. Suitable for ages 0+

name: Disney Hobby Horse Sven
description: Disney Hobby Horse Sven will be your faithful friend, always ready to ride on the right track with you. With a furry neck, soft antlers, open mouth and kind, dark eyes, Sven's heroic antics will remind you time and again that reindeer are better than people! His fuzzy coat is incredibly soft, perfect for staying warm in Frozen weather and ideal for cuddles. Sven matches with his own unique matching set of accessories, including a reindeer harness, rosette and carrot treat which are sold separately. With a sturdy, detachable wooden stick that's just the right length for all Hobby Horse adventures, these delightful Disney toys are individually hand-finished. Suitable for ages 0+

name: Disney Hobby Horse Maximus
description: Disney Hobby Horse Maximus is ready to defend the kingdom with all his mighty strength. With a long plaitable mane, flared nostrils, and a determined expression, Maximus's greatest ambition is to help Rapunzel on their next adventure together! His creamy-coloured coat is incredibly soft, perfect for fairytale dreams and ideal for cuddles. Maximus matches with his own unique set of accessories, including a headcollar, fly hood, and rosette, which is sold separately. With a sturdy, detachable wooden stick that's just the right length for all Hobby Horse adventures, these delightful Disney toys are individually hand-finished. Suitable for ages 0+

name: Hobby Horse Jump
description: Designed exclusively for hobby horse sport training, this realistic show jump is intended for controlled practice and display, not for play. This LeMieux replica show jump features fixed jump cups set at 10 cm intervals, allowing jump heights from 30 cm to 80 cm. Lightweight plastic poles are designed to dislodge safely when contacted. Manufactured in the UK. The set comprises one complete jump, including two jump wings and two jump poles. The jump base includes a pre-greased fitting section for insertion into the uprights. Handle with care during assembly. WARNING: • For hobby horse sport training use only • Not intended for play • Not suitable for persons under 14 years of age • This product is not a toy
